title: Viewer demo must show visible state changes
summary: The viewer demo should not only caption actions such as searching runbook or switching Memory/Code views; it must show the viewer state change. scripts/render viewer demo.mjs now records the control action, returns to th
body:
The viewer demo should not only caption actions such as searching runbook or switching Memory/Code views; it must show the viewer state change. scripts/render-viewer-demo.mjs now records the control action, returns to the graph, and displays a live state card with query, mode, visible node count, visible relation count, and top visible nodes.
Evidence: Inspected rendered frames: runbook search frame shows query runbook with updated counts; Memory view frame shows mode Memory and memory graph; Code graph frame shows mode Code and code graph counts/results.
